title: New Ogeenis
description: Modpack for the newest version of Cobblemon with additions such as terralith and fabric seasons
body: This is a modpack made for the newest version of cobblemon, it includes mods like teralith and fabric seasons to enhance the world and the experience of the cobblemon gameplay. Included is also many fps boosting mods such as sodium and dynamic fps for a smoother gameplay feel, and other small adventure mods to immerse yourself.
